text:
Self-explanatory:


ls /var/db
dbus			entropy			locate.database		ports
dhclient.leases.em0	fontconfig		mergemaster.mtree	portsnap
dhclient.leases.em1	freebsd-update		mixer0-state		rarian
dhclient.leases.em2	ipf			pkg			zoneinfo

Fix: 

Explain that a file exists for each interface (if that is in fact always the case).
How-To-Repeat: see above
